title: Wilder Horizons: Plentiful Paintings (MDLC)
description: Adds in over 30 new paintings to display. Technically Mod DLC for Wilder Horizons but it works without Wilder Horizons: Core Natura as well.
body: Adds in over 30 new paintings to display. Technically Mod DLC for Wilder Horizons but it works without Wilder Horizons: Core Natura as well.
